title: Integrations
description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

apps.name: CARE ABDM
apps.description: ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission) integration plugin for CARE. Enables ABHA number linking, consent management, and health information exchange with the Indian national health ecosystem.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_abdm_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE HCX
apps.description: Health Claims Exchange (HCX) integration plugin for CARE. Enables insurance claim processing, preauthorization, and communication with health insurance payers through the HCX protocol.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_hcx_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Hello
apps.description: Sample CARE plugin used to exercise the App Store discovery and setup flow.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from apps/care_hello_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Kutumba
apps.description: Kutumba integration plugin for CARE. Enables integration with the Kutumba family database system for patient identification and demographic data exchange.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_kutumba_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE LiveKit
apps.description: LiveKit integration plugin for CARE. Enables real-time video and audio communication for telemedicine consultations and remote patient monitoring.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_livekit_fe for development and manual testing.

apps.name: CARE Serial Scanner
apps.description: Cross-platform barcode scanner integration for CARE. Provides USB-COM barcode scanner support via Web Serial API with WebSocket bridge fallback for Firefox/Safari using Care Scanner Bridge.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Connect to your local development server for testing and debugging.

apps.name: CARE TeleICU Devices
apps.description: TeleICU Devices MFE Plug for CARE. Enables integration with Gateway, ONVIF Cameras, and Vitals Observation Devices (HL7 Monitors) for remote ICU monitoring.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_teleicu_devices_fe for development and manual testing.
